summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the super-intelligent bundle creation app. Backend APIs are fully functional with successful bundle processing. Frontend UI works correctly with drag & drop image upload, platform selection, and end-to-end bundle creation flow. Minor routing issue identified with dashboard direct URL access.

resolved_issues.issue: FileResponse failing due to temporary directory cleanup
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Changed to in-memory ZIP creation and Response with content

minor_issues.issue: Direct URL navigation to /dashboard redirects to main page
minor_issues.impact: Users cannot bookmark or directly access dashboard URL
minor_issues.workaround: Dashboard functionality may be accessible through in-app navigation

passed_tests: Bundle processing with valid project ID
Form validation for missing required fields
Error handling for invalid project IDs
Project name, description, and keywords input fields
Image upload via drag & drop interface
Form validation (disabled button without required fields)
ZIP bundle creation with multiple file formats
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React Router configuration for direct dashboard URL access. The dashboard component exists and works, but direct navigation to /dashboard URL redirects to main page. This may require configuring the web server to handle SPA routing or updating the React Router setup.
